'''√y-g-v''' ('''kayagav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:labilize|labilize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-g-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labilize|labilize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √y-g-v
|-
! Lemma
| kayagav
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thiyagav || jiyagav || shiyagav || kiyagav
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuyagav || jujuyagav || shushuyagav || kukuyagav
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuyagav || juyagav || shuyagav || kuyagav
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuyagav || juyagav || shuyagav || kuyagav
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || theyagav || jeyagav || sheyagav || keyagav
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothoyagav || jojoyagav || shoshoyagav || kokoyagav
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thoyagav || joyagav || shoyagav || koyagav
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thoyagav || joyagav || shoyagav || koyagav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || yagav || yagav || yagav || yagav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || yagav || yagav || yagav || yagav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || yagav || yagav || yagav || yagav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || yagav || yagav || yagav || yagav
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæyagav || jæyagav || shæyagav || kæyagav
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathayagav || jajayagav || shashayagav || kakayagav
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thayagav || jayagav || shayagav || kayagav
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thayagav || jayagav || shayagav || kayagav
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shayagav
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshayagav
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishayagav
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shayagavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshayagavnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishayagavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shayagavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshayagavnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishayagavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shayagavro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshayagavnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishayagavro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shayagavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshayagavnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishayagavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shayagavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshayagavnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishayagavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shayagavng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshayagavnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishayagavng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shayagavya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshayagavnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishayagavya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shayagavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshayagavnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishayagavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shayagavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshayagavnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishayagavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shayagavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshayagavnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishayagavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shayagavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshayagavnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishayagavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shayagavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshayagavnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishayagavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shayagavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshayagavnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishayagavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shayagavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshayagavnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishayagavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shayagavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshayagavnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishayagavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shayagavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshayagavnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishayagavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shayagavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshayagavnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishayagavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shayagavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshayagavnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishayagavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shayagavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshayagavnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishayagavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shayagavmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshayagavnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishayagavmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
